title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Misae is followed by Shin-chan when she is on her way to the bank. Once there, Shin-chan annoys her and keeps her from withdrawing any cash.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Hiroshi and Misae decide to spend some time playing badminton with Shin-chan, they disagree mid-game and begin to quarrel.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: When Masao cannot find his crayon, he gets Shin-chan to help him look for it. However, after their investigations, Shin-chan remembers where the crayon is.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: As the winter season reaches its conclusion, the students at the kindergarten and Yoshinaga celebrate by throwing beans out in the air.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: When Shin-chan catches a cold, his mother Misae takes him to a clinic for treatment. However, once there, he pesters the doctor.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Misae takes her son Shin-chan on a trip to a library to borrow some books. However, Shin-chan causes mischief which troubles the librarian and Misae.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: After Shin-chan is accompanied by his friends to Nene-chan's house, her mother prepares a cake for them. However, Shin-chan's mischief ruins it.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Misae has ordered a pizza but Shin-chan drops it and refrains from telling her. However, later when Misae eats it, she realises what happened.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: A man disallows Shin-chan and his friends from entering an area from where cherry blossoms can be observed. Consequently, whilst he is away, the kids gain entry.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: During a school trip, Shin-chan acts mischievously and pesters Yoshinaga. Later, Shin-chan drops Kazama's handkerchief when they visit the washroom.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Misae makes the decision to throw away Shin-chan's toys, Shin-chan tries to hide all of them at Shinobu's house.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Yoshinaga falls sick whilst Shin-chan awaits his mother to receive him. As a result, Shin-Chan asks Matsuzaka for assistance.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan is searching for a garbage van but whilst doing so, he ends up destroying the garbage bag and makes a big mess.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: After Shin-chan decides to help others, he is met by a man who seeks directions to Kazama's house. However, Shin-chan annoys him.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: When Shin-chan visits a retirement home, he meets a politician. However, Shin-chan ends up asking him embarrassing questions.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan and Masao are requested by Takeshi to take him to Masao's house. However, Shin-chan takes him to his house instead.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: When Misae suffers from a backache, she visits a doctor for a diagnosis and Shin-chan accompanies her. However, Shin-chan annoys the doctor.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: When Shin-chan demands that his mother blow balloons and play with him and does not give her any reprieve, Misae obliges.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: On a hot summer day, Shin-chan pesters Misae to purchase an ice crusher for him. However, he eats too much of it and suffers a stomachache.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Matsuzaka is out on a date with her boyfriend when Shin-chan turns up and interrupts them. As a result, Matsuzaka takes him home.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: After Yoshinaga ends up losing her sandal, Shin-chan tries to play detective with his friends and discovers that it was stolen by a dog.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: After Misae steps outside, Keiko meets with Shin-chan and ends up spending time with him whilst they wait for Misae to return.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Misae purchases a lottery ticket after she reads about her horoscope on a magazine. Later, she and her family dream of what they can do with their winnings.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: One day Shin-chan carries a chick to his kindergarten and leaves it in the poultry farm. Consequently, some of the birds get out of the farm.

subTitle: In order to make repairs on the broken pipe, Hiroshi climbs on to the roof. However, Shin-chan's incessant mischief causes him to lose his balance.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Shin-chan tries to offer his assistance to Misae in preparing their meals for dinner. However, his participation complicates the situation.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: Shin-chan learns how to stitch fabric and when Misae has fallen asleep, he takes the opportunity to stitch up various garments lying around the household.

subTitle: After Ginnosuke and his wife get into an argument, he leaves his home and visits Hiroshi's place where Misae and Shin-chan try to console him.

subTitle: Shin-chan pays a visit to Hitoshi and they play with each other. However, they end up using permanent ink to doodle on each other's faces.

subTitle: Shin-chan's parents take him to watch a live sumo wrestling match where Shin-chan and Misae cheer for Onishiki and Mainoumi respectively.

subTitle: Misae and Shin-chan spend time together at home after Hiroshi leaves. However, when a neighbour visits them, Shin-chan tears Misae's dress.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: After Misae receives five boxes of tissues from the market and brings them home, Shin-chan mistakenly discards the old tissues along with the new ones.

subTitle: Shin-chan calls for the fire brigade when he observes a fire whilst on patrol duty. Consequently, Misae and his pictures are shared by the newspaper.

subTitle: When Matsuzaka visits the department store to vent her frustrations and see what they have on offer, she comes across Shin-chan.

subTitle: Misae comes to learn that an crow has been scattering waste around the premises and tries to chase it. However, Shin-chan tries to help her with dynamite.

subTitle: When Shin-chan gets lost in a crowd, he is reported to the department for lost children where he helps a lost little girl reunite with her mother.

subTitle: Misae inflates an outdoor bath tub during a warm summer day and fills it with water. Later, she, Hiroshi and Shin-chan enjoy a bath in it.
